basics.name: Renata Baldissara-Kunnela
basics.label: AI Developer — LLM & Agent Systems
basics.summary: AI Developer and AI Quality Engineering specialist with 15+ years in enterprise systems (banking, insurance, integration-heavy environments). Builds production LLM and agent solutions embedded into business workflows using structured prompting, RAG grounding, fine-tuning, and tool orchestration. Designs reliability systems for modern AI: guardrails, fallback behavior, and automated evaluation (LLM-as-judge plus rule-based checks).

work.name: FriendlyAI
work.summary: Production LLM assistants and automation for customer support and lead generation with continuous-improvement evaluation loops.
highlights: Built production AI assistants and automation flows for customer support and lead generation.
Implemented tracking and quality metrics across LLM-driven flows to make assistant behavior measurable.
Designed evaluation loops (LLM-as-judge plus rule-based checks) driving continuous improvement of prompts and responses.
Integrated LLM behavior into existing business workflows with focus on reliability, fallback paths, and safe escalation.

work.name: TietoEvry / Fennia
work.summary: End-to-end API quality for RAML/MuleSoft integrations in a complex insurance environment.
highlights: Owned end-to-end API quality for RAML/MuleSoft APIs across complex insurance integrations.
Managed test cases and release evidence in TestRail and Jira; built exportable evidence packs for release-readiness reviews.
Built Postman test automation suites covering contract, integration, and regression scenarios.
Collaborated with developers and architects to resolve integration defects across multi-system insurance flows.

work.name: Samlink Oyj
work.summary: Scalable test automation and QA practices for banking-grade systems under strict reliability and audit requirements.
highlights: Developed scalable test automation for banking-grade systems using Robot Framework and Python.
Established QA practices for integration-heavy service chains under strict reliability and audit requirements.
Designed regression and release-readiness pipelines for production deployments in regulated environments.
Mentored testers and supported requirement clarification with developers and business analysts.

awards.title: 4 AI products shipped to production
awards.summary: FriendlyAI assistants, Lumanela.fi (100–500 conversations/month), Jurevo multi-agent orchestration, plus internal evaluation systems.

awards.title: 3 open-source frameworks published
awards.summary: ALMA-memory (PyPI + npm), AGtestari, and VERITAS-framework — all available on GitHub.

awards.title: 15+ years across regulated enterprise environments
awards.summary: Banking-grade systems at Samlink and insurance integrations at TietoEvry/Fennia under audit and compliance constraints.

strengths.title: End-to-end AI ownership
strengths.description: From prompt design and RAG grounding through guardrails, evaluation, and production reliability — full LLM lifecycle, not just the prototype layer.

strengths.title: Enterprise discipline applied to AI
strengths.description: 15+ years in banking and insurance environments under audit and compliance constraints; reliability and traceability as baseline, not bonus.

strengths.title: Cross-functional communication
strengths.description: Multilingual (Portuguese, Finnish, English, Spanish) and experienced bridging developers, architects, and business stakeholders across multi-system enterprise flows.

projects.name: ALMA-memory
projects.description: Persistent memory layer for AI agents. Alternative to Mem0 with scoped learning, anti-patterns, multi-agent sharing, and MCP integration.

projects.name: AGtestari
projects.description: AI-powered unified testing platform deploying autonomous QA agents into customer Azure environments. Consolidates frontend, backend, mobile, accessibility, and performance testing through a 12-phase enterprise workflow.

projects.name: VERITAS-framework
projects.description: Evaluation framework for AI systems with LLM-as-judge capabilities, quality metrics, and regression testing support.

projects.name: Jurevo
projects.description: Multi-agent orchestration with controlled tools and a chat evaluation harness (LLM-as-judge plus rule checks). Modular backend and high-performance enterprise search.

projects.name: Lumanela.fi
projects.description: LLM with RAG and fine-tuning. Structured prompt logic and edge-function orchestration in production.
